query: clashing neon colors photograph aggressive saturation
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / clashing_disharmony — aggressive neon clashes, jarring saturation, unbalanced palettes

response.objective_caption: An interior view of a dark room with illuminated linear light fixtures in electric blue, cyan, magenta, and yellow suspended overhead, casting vivid reflections on a glossy dark floor; the scene is arranged with perfect vertical symmetry, showing branching and intersecting lines of colored light against a black background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph of a dark interior with overhead neon light fixtures in electric blue, cyan, magenta, and yellow reflected on a glossy floor, presented with perfect vertical symmetry; the image abandons representational clarity in favor of shape, color, and gesture, rendering the scene as a non-representational composition where intersecting light lines and vivid hues take precedence over recognizable subject matter.
